title: Andy Baxter practicing a book!

title: 1  Introduction
text:
This is a book created from markdown and executable code.
See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming. Lots of options exist (Baxter 2019).

title: 2  Summary
text:
In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.
